left.name: doe
left.commandTemplate: env DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH=bench/vendor/dawn/out/Release:$DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH runtime/zig/zig-out/bin/doe-zig-runtime --commands {commands} --quirks {quirks} --vendor apple --api metal --family m3 --driver 1.0.0 --backend native --backend-lane metal_doe_comparable --execute --trace --queue-sync-mode {queue_sync_mode} --upload-buffer-usage {upload_buffer_usage} --upload-submit-every {upload_submit_every} --trace-jsonl {trace_jsonl} --trace-meta {trace_meta} --gpu-timestamp-mode off --kernel-root bench/kernels {extra_args}

right.name: dawn_delegate
right.commandTemplate: env DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH=bench/vendor/dawn/out/Release:$DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH runtime/zig/zig-out/bin/doe-zig-runtime --commands {commands} --quirks {quirks} --vendor apple --api metal --family m3 --driver 1.0.0 --backend native --backend-lane metal_dawn_release --execute --trace --queue-sync-mode {queue_sync_mode} --upload-buffer-usage {upload_buffer_usage} --upload-submit-every {upload_submit_every} --trace-jsonl {trace_jsonl} --trace-meta {trace_meta} --gpu-timestamp-mode off --kernel-root bench/kernels {extra_args}
